description: Get ready to go out and explore in style in these Zephyral floaters from adidas. Designed for comfort, they look great when teamed with cargo shorts and tees.UpperSynthetic upper made of twill tapes with straps around ankle and forefoot joined with a strap in betweenVelcro strap closures on the forefoot and ankle for snug FitSlightly padded panels on the sides, collar and side of the footBrand logo embossed on the strapsFoam footbed in lighter shade with elevated ridge pattern for stimulation of the sole and all day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with impact guidance system for enabling natural motion of the feetFlex grooves for better flexibility of the feetHeel counter and toe counter for better protectionSandal careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
